creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
Created attachment 247452
net/cloud-init: new release: 23.4.1

this updates net/cloud-init-devel to today's merged /run → /var/run relocation

see https://github.com/canonical/cloud-init/pull/4677
and https://github.com/canonical/cloud-init/issues/4180 / https://github.com/canonical/cloud-init/issues/4231 for some of the bugs fixed
